LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SHARON PERLMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE NOTICE IS SUFFICIENT AND THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES A LANDLORD-TENANT RELATIONSHIP, BREACH OF THE AGREEMENT AND THE REQUISITE NOTICE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SHARON PERLMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: overruled with 5 days to answer. The notice is sufficient and the complaint alleges a landlord-tenant relationship, breach of the agreement and the requisite notice. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
